title: 8 more fixes — Save All honesty, stuck spinners, share crash, back-during-call
notes: FIX: Account Settings 'All Saved ✓' now only shows after the write actually succeeds (was lying on network errors)
FIX: Edit Profile save button no longer stuck on 'Saving...' if the network fails — now shows a toast and resets
FIX: Wallet purchase 'Processing...' no longer stuck forever on network reject — properly resets + toasts the error
FIX: Wallet 'You are buying' confirm screen now shows the ₹ price (was an empty grey row)
FIX: Sharing an image-only post from your profile no longer crashes

FIX: Pressing the hardware back button during a call now properly hangs up — leaves Agora cleanly, persists coins, updates the call_invites row, writes the in-chat call log (was silently leaving zombie sessions)
FIX: Photo upload failure now shows a toast instead of a blocking alert dialog
FIX: Sharing a moment to a friend now actually delivers — was writing to a column that doesn't exist in the messages table
